nasb.text: David said to Saul, “Why do you listen to the words of men, saying, ‘Behold, David seeks to harm you’?

esv.text: And David said to Saul, “Why do you listen to the words of men who say, ‘Behold, David seeks your harm’?

cnv.text: 大衛對掃羅說：“你為甚麼聽信人的話，說：‘大衛想要害你’呢？

ccb.text: 大卫对扫罗说：“你为什么听信谗言，认为我要谋害你呢？
